descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Keyflare. Present 5 Skill cards from the current Realm, choose to {Discover} up to 3 of them, and make them Tawil's cards with {Exhaust} and {Retain}. The next Tawil's Command Card you play takes effect twice.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Keyflare. Present 5 Skill cards from the current Realm, choose to {Discover} up to 3 of them, and make them Tawil's cards with {Exhaust}, {Prepare 1}, and {Retain}. The next Tawil's Command Card you play takes effect twice.
